title: Jira Change Calendar Collision — Overlapping CAB-Approved Windows
dataSources: Jira Service Management change tickets with planned start/end
app: Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud (6211) + CMDB lookup `service_ci`
spl:
index=itsm sourcetype="jira:cloud:issues" OR sourcetype="jira:issue"
| where issue_type="Change" OR labels="change"
| eval start=start_epoch, end=end_epoch
| where isnotnull(start) AND isnotnull(end)
| sort 0 start
| streamstats window=1 current=f latest(end) as prev_end latest(key) as prev_key by service_ci
| where start < prev_end AND prev_key!=key
| table key, prev_key, service_ci, start, end, prev_end
description: Overlapping production changes increase rollback complexity and blast radius.
value: Lets CAB reviewers cancel or sequence conflicting windows before approval.
implementation: Require ISO timestamps in custom fields; normalize to epoch at ingest.
visualization: Gantt-style table, Alert email to CAB.

references.title: Source types — Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud
